name: production-hybrid-reference
description: Open-source reference architecture for production Capacitor + React + Node.js applications

scripts.docs:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const docs=['Architecture','PushNotifications','RevenueCat','Deployment','Environment','Troubleshooting','Lessons','ProductionChecklist'];docs.forEach(d=>{const p='docs/'+d+'.md';if(!fs.existsSync(p))throw new Error('Missing '+p)});console.log('All docs present.')"
